issuer_name_as_stated: Shree Tirupati Balajee Agro Trading Company Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings filed by and against each entity. For matters against the group, I counted 2 criminal proceedings: 1 against the Promoter and 1 against the Directors; the Company and Subsidiaries each show Nil. The table has no statutory/regulatory enforcement column, so regulatory actions are not disclosed; tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries are 5 and 4 respectively, totaling 9, while all By rows and promoter personal amounts are excluded. The quantified litigation amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹49.61 lakhs plus ₹69.90 lakhs, totaling ₹119.51 lakhs, converted to ₹11.951 crore at 100 lakhs per crore. The contingent-liabilities figure uses the explicitly stated Total of ₹9,553.90 lakhs as at March 31, 2024, converted to ₹95.539 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, FY 2024, is 32.23% for the top five and 46.20% for the top ten, calculated as a percentage of revenue from operations; the source tables use ₹ lakhs.
